# git-spark Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-19

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 6.x, Node.js >=20.19.0, npm >=10.0.0 + commander, chalk, boxen, ora, table, semver; dev tools: jest/ts-jest, eslint, @typescript-eslint, prettier, typedoc (001-dependency-hygiene-hardening)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
test/
```

## Commands

npm run prebuild; npm test; npm run lint; npm run build

## Code Style

TypeScript 6.x, Node.js >=20.19.0, npm >=10.0.0: Follow standard conventions

## Recent Changes

- 001-dependency-hygiene-hardening: Added TypeScript 6.x, Node.js >=20.19.0, npm >=10.0.0 + commander, chalk, boxen, ora, table, semver; dev tools: jest/ts-jest, eslint, @typescript-eslint, prettier, typedoc
